Garth Hightower, called Greysteel,[1] is a knight of House Hightower and the second son of Lord Leyton Hightower.[1]

Contents

  • 1 Character
  • 2 Recent Events
    • 2.1 A Feast for Crows
  • 3 Family
  • 4 References

Character[ ]

Garth is a knight of some repute.[2]

Recent Events[ ]

A Feast for Crows[ ]

After the ironborn attack the Reach, Garth is given the task of training new troops at Oldtown.[3]
